 I'm not sure if this follows the same thread=2C but looks a hell of a lot l=
 ike it is similar. I'm also unsure of whether I have the procedure right in=
  replying this way... :)

 mklib: Installing libGL.so.1 libGL.so in ../../../lib

 Any thoughts?
